description: Project lifecycle hooks for session management

sessionStart.description: Create session state and check for active project
actions: If yes, read project_id and suggest continuing that project

sessionEnd.description: Verify that closeout has been performed

postToolUse.description: Track created artifacts for the deliverables manifest

notes: Hooks should support the closeout flow, not replace it
Real intelligence lives in scripts/ — hooks are for guardrails and plumbing
This file is a specification, not executable code — agent platforms interpret it
